text.title: Mocking Strategies Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to emit a validated mocking-spec from a dependency graph.

section.title: Procedure
section.p: Step 1 — Enumerate deps. Parse `templates/_smoke-test.yaml` (or the project's dependency-graph.yaml). For each dep record: boundary, mutability, third_party, reuse count across test files.
Step 2 — Classify boundary. Tag each dep as io-network / io-fs / time / random / third-party / own-code. Wrap every third-party dep in an adapter at `decision.adapter_layer_path` (r4).
Step 3 — Pick double type. Walk `content/06-decision-tree.xml`. Leaves: r-stub-pick / r-mock-pick / r-fake-pick / leave-real. Record per dep.
Step 4 — Pin tool. Python → pytest-mock + autospec. JS → vi.mock + vi.spyOn + vi.clearAllMocks. Go → interface substitution or mockery. Time → freezegun / fake-timers / clockwork (r6).

Step 5 — Lint + emit. Run `templates/over-mock-lint.py` over the existing test directory; record over-mock count. Run `scripts/validate-mocking-strategies.py spec.json`; on exit 0, commit spec + lint report.

text.reference: Lint pass over an existing suite.
